'''âth-p-th''' ('''kathapath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zugzwang|zugzwang]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-p-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zugzwang|zugzwang]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-p-th
|-
! Lemma
| kathapath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithapath|thithapath]] || [[word:jithapath|jithapath]] || [[word:shithapath|shithapath]] || [[word:kithapath|kithapath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthapath|thuthuthapath]] || [[word:jujuthapath|jujuthapath]] || [[word:shushuthapath|shushuthapath]] || [[word:kukuthapath|kukuthapath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthapath|thuthapath]] || [[word:juthapath|juthapath]] || [[word:shuthapath|shuthapath]] || [[word:kuthapath|kuthapath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthapath|thuthapath]] || [[word:juthapath|juthapath]] || [[word:shuthapath|shuthapath]] || [[word:kuthapath|kuthapath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethapath|thethapath]] || [[word:jethapath|jethapath]] || [[word:shethapath|shethapath]] || [[word:kethapath|kethapath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothapath|thothothapath]] || [[word:jojothapath|jojothapath]] || [[word:shoshothapath|shoshothapath]] || [[word:kokothapath|kokothapath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothapath|thothapath]] || [[word:jothapath|jothapath]] || [[word:shothapath|shothapath]] || [[word:kothapath|kothapath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothapath|thothapath]] || [[word:jothapath|jothapath]] || [[word:shothapath|shothapath]] || [[word:kothapath|kothapath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthapath|thĂŠthapath]] || [[word:jĂŠthapath|jĂŠthapath]] || [[word:shĂŠthapath|shĂŠthapath]] || [[word:kĂŠthapath|kĂŠthapath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathapath|thathathapath]] || [[word:jajathapath|jajathapath]] || [[word:shashathapath|shashathapath]] || [[word:kakathapath|kakathapath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathapath|thathapath]] || [[word:jathapath|jathapath]] || [[word:shathapath|shathapath]] || [[word:kathapath|kathapath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathapath|thathapath]] || [[word:jathapath|jathapath]] || [[word:shathapath|shathapath]] || [[word:kathapath|kathapath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathapath|shathapath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathapath|goshathapath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathapath|gokishathapath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathapathnĂŒ|shathapathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathapathnknĂŒ|goshathapathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathapathnĂŒ|gokishathapathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathapathshĂ«|shathapathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathapathnkshĂ«|goshathapathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathapathshĂ«|gokishathapathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathapathro|shathapathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathapathnkro|goshathapathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathapathro|gokishathapathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathapathmu|shathapathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathapathnkmu|goshathapathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathapathmu|gokishathapathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathapathsher|shathapathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathapathnksher|goshathapathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathapathsher|gokishathapathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathapathng|shathapathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathapathnkng|goshathapathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathapathng|gokishathapathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathapathya|shathapathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathapathnkya|goshathapathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathapathya|gokishathapathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathapathyam|shathapathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathapathnkyam|goshathapathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathapathyam|gokishathapathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathapathnĂŒshĂ«|shathapathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathapathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshathapathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathapathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishathapathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathapathnĂŒro|shathapathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathapathnknĂŒro|goshathapathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathapathnĂŒro|gokishathapathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathapathnĂŒmu|shathapathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathapathnknĂŒmu|goshathapathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathapathnĂŒmu|gokishathapathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathapathshĂ«nĂŒ|shathapathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathapathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathapathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathapathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathapathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathapathshĂ«ro|shathapathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathapathnkshĂ«ro|goshathapathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathapathshĂ«ro|gokishathapathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathapathshĂ«mu|shathapathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathapathnkshĂ«mu|goshathapathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathapathshĂ«mu|gokishathapathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathapathronĂŒ|shathapathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathapathnkronĂŒ|goshathapathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathapathronĂŒ|gokishathapathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathapathroshĂ«|shathapathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathapathnkroshĂ«|goshathapathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathapathroshĂ«|gokishathapathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathapathromu|shathapathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathapathnkromu|goshathapathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathapathromu|gokishathapathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathapathmunĂŒ|shathapathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathapathnkmunĂŒ|goshathapathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathapathmunĂŒ|gokishathapathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathapathmushĂ«|shathapathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathapathnkmushĂ«|goshathapathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathapathmushĂ«|gokishathapathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathapathmuro|shathapathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathapathnkmuro|goshathapathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathapathmuro|gokishathapathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
